name: marker-highlight
title: Marker Highlight
description: Display text settles in, then one hand-drawn marker stroke (highlight, circle, underline, or scribble) draws over the emphasized word on cue.
evidence: Wave J U-M rebuild: corpus emphasis unit, getTotalLength dash draw over a substring-matched word

variables.label: Emphasis word
variables.description: First case-insensitive substring match in text receives the marker. Empty or unmatched draws no marker.

variables.label: Marker style
variables.description: Shape of the hand-drawn marker stroke.

variables.label: Draw at
variables.description: Second (from mount start) the marker starts drawing. Clamped so the stroke completes before any exit.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Marker ink color from the contract token map.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. Default none: the lockup holds until the frame cuts.
